Press Start+L For Maximum Duel Points
Press Start+L To Unlock Card Limit Option
Press Select+Down To Access Draw Phase
Press B+Up To Access Booster Menu
Hold R+Up To Activate Harpie's Feather Duster
Press R+Right To Activate Monster Reborn
Press R+Left To Activate Change of Heart
Press Start+Down To Start Pyramid Scenario
Press L+R+Down To Access All Characters
